arts.ttl: Como Pursue Napoli’s Ngonge in January Transfer Window
arts.sum: Como have set their sights on Napoli forward Cyril Ngonge as a potential reinforcement for the January transfer window. The Lombardy-based club has initiated contact with Napoli regarding the Belgian attacker, signaling their serious interest in acquiring his services. The post Como Pursue Napoli’s Ngonge in January Transfer Window appeared first on FootItalia.com.
